ingredients.item: 2 cups (100 g) packed roughly chopped fresh parsley (about 1 bunch)
ingredients.original: 2 cups (100 g) packed roughly chopped fresh parsley (about 1 bunch)

ingredients.item: 1 cup (40 g) packed roughly chopped fresh cilantro (about ½ bunch)
ingredients.original: 1 cup (40 g) packed roughly chopped fresh cilantro (about ½ bunch)

ingredients.item: 1 Add the parsley, cilantro, and garlic to a small food processor and pulse until finely chopped.
ingredients.original: 1 Add the parsley, cilantro, and garlic to a small food processor and pulse until finely chopped.

ingredients.item: 2 Add the paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, cayenne, oil, lemon juice, and lemon zest and pulse a few more times to combine. The sauce texture should be rough, not smooth.
ingredients.original: 2 Add the paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, cayenne, oil, lemon juice, and lemon zest and pulse a few more times to combine. The sauce texture should be rough, not smooth.

ingredients.item: 3 Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator and use within 1 to 2 weeks.
ingredients.original: 3 Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator and use within 1 to 2 weeks.

ingredients.item:
LABNEH
3 cups (720 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt (6% to 11% fat)
1 teaspoon kosher salt
ingredients.original:
LABNEH
3 cups (720 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt (6% to 11% fat)
